sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41844" key="e)pore/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπορέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n41844.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπόρνυμαι</ref></xr>, prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:137:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">137.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
